domain.title: Domain
domain.description: Which StepStone hospitality site to scrape

startPath.title: Start Path
startPath.description: URL path for the job search. Examples: /jobs/hotellerie-gastronomie-touristik-deutschland (all Germany), /jobs/koch (all chef roles), /jobs/hotellerie-gastronomie-touristik-berlin (Berlin only).

maxJobs.title: Max Jobs
maxJobs.description: Hard cap on total number of jobs to scrape. Set to a large number for a full run.

offersPerPage.title: Offers Per Page
offersPerPage.description: Matches the site pagination size. Do not change unless the site changes its pagination.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of parallel browser tabs. Keep at 2–4 to avoid bot detection.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy settings. Residential proxies are recommended.
